text.message: K try this and I’ll give future ore and wheat
I gave you an ore for free
Can I get that back maybe
So I gave you a free ore
And you didn’t help at all
I don’t have to do that
Was kind of the moral thing to do
But I want you to be happy :)
why would he trade u pops when he wants to pop
If I don’t buy a dev here we lose
You’re on road, when you get a city you become the threat
Are you serious with that trade
You don’t help me pop and then demand a 1:2 on your turn
Red in the lead but oj just annoying man
lol says the person who just monoed
Nah man I’d rather have red win
I csnt trade if I have nothing to gain
It’s called helping people out and getting help in return
I literally offered a future city trade earlier
and he was trying to dirty mono
And you try and demand 1:2 trades after not helping whatsoever
how does he get mono im so sick
brother why did you prevent me from extending
but genuinely there is something off about you
No one’s gonna do a nb deal for the win man
lowkey ur a genius i did not see that
Blue please help bruh I’ll give you my firstborn child
is there any way i can get a road blue
if only u could give me rb
Don’t even try it my guy
you are about to also be on 9
that mono is the worst thing that has happened to me
also stop trading for the love of god
Offering a trade at 9 with open settle and 10 cards is crazzzzzzzzzy
